full_text:
Xin Ming 辛明
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xin Ming (辛明). Dispatched with fifty thousand troops to Liyang. Xin Ming may not have existed in history. Xin Ming was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
